name: com.yunxee.cocoflow
description: A modular Unity game development framework — Core (ServiceLocator / EventBus / StateMachine), Modules (Input / Camera / UI / Animation / Map / Rendering / Persistence), Gameplay (Character), optional add-ons, and Editor toolchain.

samples.description: Fusion-oriented network compatibility plan based on input and context synchronization bridges.
Sample enemy behavior states, intent/config assets, and a prefab wired to the CoCoFlow Enemy foundation.
Sample player CCS states and a prefab wired to CharacterContext and CharacterLocomotion.
